name: Merry Munchies Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Grease cookie sheets.
3. In a large bowl, combine butter and brown sugar; beat until light and fluffy.
4. Add egg and vanilla, mixing well.
5. Stir in flour, baking powder, and salt; mix until combined.
6. Fold in raisins and walnuts.
7. Drop by tablespoonfuls onto the prepared cookie sheets.
8. Bake for 10 to 12 minutes in the upper third of the oven.
9. Remove from cookie sheets and let cool on wire racks.
10. Makes 3 dozen cookies.
